features: Our Black Elastic Hair Bands are made of 100% real rubber material, with good elastic, easy to stretch, These Hair Ties will not break easily and are the Perfect Small Hair Bands.
Product Size:Black Rubber Bands having 1 mm thickness and 1.5 cm length They can be stretched up to 8-10 cm easily,They are not too thin to snap, neither too thick for use.

Abundant Quantity:Hair Elastics Approximate 500 pcs is quite enough quantity for daily use for baby, girls, teenage, women or men not matter you have long or short hair, curls, ponytail, braiding, daily hairdos and all kinds of hairstyles.
Easy TO TAKE:Black Elastic Hair Bands are packed in a clear box, easy to store in the office, home, convenient to store and pick.

Works for all hair:Whether you have thick hair, thin hair, curly hair, Afro hair, long hair, or short hair, these rubber bands can hold it up for all ethnic styles.Good for girls different hairstyles, hair design,ponytails, braiding, wedding hairstyle, party or DIY more charming hairstyles.
